name: T3 VWAP Confluence Entry
edge_hypothesis: T3 (Tillson Triple Smoothed EMA) is the smoothest adaptive moving average in the indicator library, virtually eliminating whipsaws while maintaining responsiveness. VWAP (Volume Weighted Average Price) has NEVER been tested in any strategy — it represents an entirely untapped signal source. The hypothesis: when price is above both T3 (trend direction) AND VWAP (volume-weighted fair value), we have confluence of technical trend AND institutional positioning. Trades where both smart-money price level and trend filter agree should have superior follow-through. This tests a completely new signal dimension — volume-weighted price levels.

variants.name: t3_vwap_v1_8to1
variants.description: Close above T3 confirms smooth trend. Close above VWAP confirms volume-weighted buying pressure. Both must agree for entry. 8:1 R:R at proven sweet spot.

components.notes: Tillson T3 — triple-smoothed EMA. Ultra-smooth trend direction with minimal whipsaws.
Daily VWAP — volume-weighted average price. Never tested. Represents institutional fair value.

variants.name: t3_vwap_v2_wide_10to1
variants.description: Same T3+VWAP confluence with wider stop (2.0 ATR) and 10:1 R:R. Tests whether the wider-stop pattern that succeeded with Supertrend CCI transfers to this signal pair.

indicator_roles.baseline: T3_10_0.7 — Tillson Triple Smoothed EMA, ultra-smooth trend direction
indicator_roles.confirmation: VWAP_D — Daily Volume Weighted Average Price, institutional fair value level
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — adaptive position sizing and risk management
